top_findings.title: No date range filtering on match queries
top_findings.evidence: src/queries.rs:18-26 — MatchFilter has season: Option<i32> but no start_date/end_date fields. TASK.md requires 'filter by date range and/or season'; only season is implemented.
top_findings.suggestion: Add start_date and end_date fields to MatchFilter and wire them through find_matches and the MCP tool schema.
